entities.name: LinkedIn
entities.context: Professional networking platform undergoing strategic shift from utility to engagement network, degrading signal-to-noise ratio for professional matching

entities.name: Innovator's Dilemma
entities.context: Framework explaining how dominant platforms sacrifice core utility to serve more profitable but less valuable business models (engagement ads)

entities.name: Utility
entities.context: Product paradigm characterized by 'get in, get the job done, get out' - requires precision for high-stakes professional transactions

entities.name: Network
entities.context: Product paradigm characterized by 'stay, browse, consume' - optimized for engagement and ad revenue over precision

entities.name: Opening for the Overlay
entities.context: V's theory that when platforms degrade core utility, market opportunity emerges for focused, high-performance tools built on top of the degraded data layer

entities.name: Superhuman
entities.context: Email client referenced as model for high-utility overlay tools

entities.name: Superhuman for LinkedIn
entities.context: Hypothetical high-utility tool that strips away social noise and focuses on professional networking and matching

relationships.context: V analyzes LinkedIn's strategic shift through this framework
LinkedIn's original and primary value proposition being abandoned
LinkedIn's current strategic direction optimizing for time-on-site and ad revenue
Contrasting product paradigms - transition from former to latter degrades professional matching precision
LinkedIn's degradation creates market opportunity for unbundled high-utility overlays
Superhuman email client serves as conceptual model for the LinkedIn opportunity
Would provide focused high-performance interface on top of LinkedIn's data layer
